steps.text: The time of day has a name. Early in the day, when you wake up, is called morning. Press Wake up!
steps.feedback: Morning! The sun is low and the sky is bright. It is morning time.

steps.text: When the sun is right at the top of the sky, it is called midday. Press Lunch!
steps.feedback: Midday — the sun is at its highest. That is why lunchtime feels so bright!

steps.text: Later, when the sun starts to go down, it is called evening. Press Dinner!
steps.feedback: Evening — the sky turns orange and the sun gets low. Evening is dinner time.

steps.text: When it is dark and the moon is out, it is called night. Press Bedtime!
steps.feedback: Night time — the moon is out and the stars appear. Morning, midday, evening, night — you know them all!
